title: Plushie Pack - The Original Player Heads Into Plushies
description: Turns player heads into plushies! Requires EMF or Optifine.
body:
Turns player heads into plushies! Works with all skins. Incompatible with 3d skin layers. Requires EMF and ETF or Optifine.

 

EMF: https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features

ETF: https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures

(Incompatible with immediately fast and 3d skin layers.)
